memberArea.registerSubtitle: Kota na communauté ya CFM. Compte na yo ekondimama na équipe liboso ya kofungwama.
memberArea.registerSuccess: Komikoma esimbi! Compte na yo ekofungwama sima ya bondimi ya équipe CFM.
memberArea.prefillNotice: Ba informations ya demande na yo ya adhésion esili kotiama — pona kaka mot de passe.
memberArea.pendingBanner: Compte na yo ezali kozela bondimi ya équipe CFM.
memberArea.volunteerBanner: Esika ya bénévole: tala tableau de bord na yo.

engageExtra.quickSignupDesc: Nzela mosusu kozanga mot de passe — équipe CFM ekondima yango na maboko.
engageExtra.transparencyBody: CFM elaka polele mobimba epai ya bapesi ba dons. Contribution nionso esalelamaka mpo na misala ya plaidoyer, ba études mpe lisalisi ya mbala moko epai ya ba familles militaires.
engageExtra.fund1: Ba études mpe ba rapports ya plaidoyer
engageExtra.fund2: Ba campagnes mpo basi mpe ba veuves bamitelemela
engageExtra.fund3: Lisalisi ya ba familles oyo ezali na pasi
engageExtra.fund4: Misala na terrain na ba provinces
engageExtra.annualReport: Rapport ya mbula ezali; senga yango epai ya équipe administrative.
engageExtra.partnerBody: Ba institutions, ba ONG mpe ba entreprises: benga biso mpo na kosala partenariat na CFM.
engageExtra.demoPayment: Mode démo : paiement simulé. Configurez MOBILE_MONEY_MODE=production et PayDunya pour la production.
engageExtra.prodPayment: Kofuta na sécurité na nzela ya PayDunya (Orange Money, M-Pesa, Airtel).
engageExtra.sandboxPayment: Mode test: kofuta na esika ya komeka ya PayDunya, mbongo ya solo ekobima te.

benevole.label: Bénévole
benevole.description: Mpo na kokota na équipe mpe kosala elongo na misala ya CFM.

social.title: Bomoi ya bato
social.description: Kobongisa bomoi ya balongani, ba veuves, ba orphelins mpe bana ya ba militaires.
details: Bobateli ya bomoi ya bato oyo elendisami

Lisungi ya motema mpe ya lisanga
Kondima pasi oyo libota emonaka

economique.description: Kosalisa basi mpe ba veuves bamitelemela na nzela ya entrepreneuriat mpe bozwi ya mbongo.

education.title: Boyekoli

details: Bandako ya kofanda ya malamu

Développement ya seko ya ba communautés ya ba militaires
